parameters.query: SELECT ac.code, ac.nom, ac.setup_price, ac.monthly_price, ac.workflow_templates, t.name AS tenant_name FROM automation_catalog ac, tenants t WHERE ac.id = '{{ $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.automationId }}'::uuid AND t.id = '{{ $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.tenantId }}'::uuid

SELECT id, n8n_folder_id, n8n_folder_name, n8n_workflow_ids, status FROM automation_purchases WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.tenantId }}'::uuid AND automation_id = '{{ $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.automationId }}'::uuid LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO automation_purchases (tenant_id, automation_id, status, n8n_folder_id, n8n_folder_name, n8n_workflow_ids, setup_price_paid, monthly_price, config, activated_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.automationId }}'::uuid, 'active', '{{ $json.clientTag }}', '{{ $json.clientTag }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.allWorkflowIds) }}'::jsonb, {{ $json.setupPrice }}, {{ $json.monthlyPrice }}, '{{ JSON.stringify($json.config || {}) }}'::jsonb, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, automation_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'active', n8n_folder_id = EXCLUDED.n8n_folder_id, n8n_folder_name = EXCLUDED.n8n_folder_name, n8n_workflow_ids = EXCLUDED.n8n_workflow_ids, config = EXCLUDED.config, activated_at = NOW(), suspended_at = NULL, cancelled_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id, status

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.error || 'Donnees invalides' }) }}
